subcodes.first_line: That which was mentioned in thy letter hath attained unto the presence of the Wronged One. God's loving-kindness hath been with thee from the beginning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه در نامه ات مذکور بلحاظ مظلوم فائز شد عنایه الله نسبت بشما از اول بوده از
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
